description: Evaluate three vendors for 500 units of industrial sensors. Choose the vendor with the best balance of price, quality certification, and delivery lead time.
task_instruction: Select the best vendor based on price, quality certifications, defect rate, and delivery time. Output a procurement decision.

description: Review and approve a supplier invoice for payment. Verify line items match the purchase order.
task_instruction: Verify invoice line items against the purchase order. Approve if they match exactly; reject if there are discrepancies.

description: Rank four RFQ responses for office furniture procurement. Prioritise total cost, warranty, and local support.
task_instruction: Rank all vendors by weighted score: price 40%, warranty 30%, local support 20%, delivery 10%.
vendor_data: {"quantity": 200, "item": "ergonomic office chairs", "budget_per_unit_usd": 350, "rfq_responses": [{"vendor": "OfficePro", "unit_price_usd": 320, "warranty_years": 3, "local_support": true, "delivery_weeks": 4}, {"vendor": "FurnishGlobal", "unit_price_usd": 295, "warranty_years": 2, "local_support": false, "delivery_weeks": 8}, {"vendor": "ErgoElite", "unit_price_usd": 340, "warranty_years": 5, "local_support": true, "delivery_weeks": 3}, {"vendor": "BudgetSeating", "unit_price_usd": 280, "warranty_years": 1, "local_support": false, "delivery_weeks": 10}]}

description: Assess the supply chain risk of continuing with a sole-source supplier for a critical component.
task_instruction: Evaluate supplier risk level (low/medium/high/critical) based on financial rating, delivery performance, and supply chain concentration.

description: Review key clauses in a supplier contract for compliance with company procurement policy.
task_instruction: Check contract clauses against policy requirements. Output COMPLIANT or NON-COMPLIANT with specific violations.
vendor_data: {"contract_excerpt": "5.1 Payment terms: Net-60 days. 5.2 Late penalty: 2% per month. 6.1 Warranty: 12 months. 7.1 Liability cap: 2x contract value.", "policy": {"max_payment_days": 45, "min_warranty_months": 18, "max_late_penalty_pct": 1.5}}

description: Choose between two cloud infrastructure providers for a 3-year contract covering hosting and managed services.
task_instruction: Select the cloud provider offering the best value considering uptime SLA, support tier, compliance certifications, and total contract cost.

task_instruction: Select the packaging supplier offering the best combination of unit cost, lead time, minimum order quantity, and sustainability certification.

description: Select a cybersecurity consulting firm for a 12-month engagement covering penetration testing and compliance audit.
task_instruction: Choose the security firm with the strongest credentials, most relevant certifications, and best value for the scope of work.

description: Choose a raw material supplier for pharmaceutical-grade excipients requiring strict GMP compliance.
task_instruction: Select the supplier with the required GMP certification, lowest defect rate, and acceptable delivery schedule.

task_instruction: Choose the translation vendor that covers all required languages, meets quality standards, and fits the project timeline and budget.

description: Evaluate two ERP system vendors for a mid-sized manufacturing company implementation.
task_instruction: Select the ERP vendor based on total cost of ownership, implementation timeline, support model, and manufacturing module capability.

description: Select a marketing agency for a digital campaign across social media and search platforms.
task_instruction: Choose the agency offering the best track record in B2B digital marketing, relevant industry experience, and within budget.

task_instruction: Select the steel supplier meeting all grade specifications, with the lowest total cost and reliable delivery.

task_instruction: Select the HR platform with the best feature set for performance management, reporting capabilities, integration with existing HRIS, and cost.

description: Select a laboratory testing services provider for ongoing quality control of food products.
task_instruction: Choose the lab with required accreditations, fastest turnaround, and competitive pricing for the testing panel.

description: Review an invoice from a logistics provider that includes an unexpected fuel surcharge.
task_instruction: Approve the invoice if all line items match the contract terms. Reject and query any charges not in the original contract.

description: Approve a professional services invoice for consulting work completed last quarter.
task_instruction: Verify hours billed match the SOW deliverables and approved budget. Approve if within 5% variance, otherwise reject.

description: Process a software licence renewal invoice with an unapproved price increase.
task_instruction: Compare invoice price against last year's contract plus any approved CPI adjustment (max 3%). Reject if increase exceeds approved rate.

description: Review a maintenance services invoice for office HVAC systems.
task_instruction: Check that all service items were authorised under the annual maintenance contract. Flag unauthorised work orders.

description: Approve a raw materials invoice where quantity received matches the purchase order.
task_instruction: Match invoice quantity and price per unit to goods receipt note. Approve if all items match within tolerance.

description: Process a training services invoice for a completed employee upskilling programme.
task_instruction: Approve if training was delivered per contract scope and all participant counts match. Reject partial or undelivered services.

description: Review a marketing agency invoice containing charges for unapproved out-of-scope deliverables.
task_instruction: Approve only the in-scope line items as defined in the SOW. Reject or flag items not in the approved deliverable list.

description: Approve a catering services invoice for a corporate event with headcount matching the booking.
task_instruction: Verify the headcount billed matches the final confirmed guest list. Approve if within 10% variance.

description: Rank three RFQ responses for industrial cleaning services at a manufacturing plant.
task_instruction: Rank vendors by weighted score: price 35%, safety record 30%, experience 20%, availability 15%.
ground_truth_decision: IndustrialCare Ltd > CleanTech Pro > SparkClean Services

description: Rank four RFQ responses for IT helpdesk outsourcing covering 24/7 support.
task_instruction: Rank by: SLA response time 40%, cost per ticket 30%, CSAT score 20%, language coverage 10%.

description: Rank five vendors responding to an RFQ for renewable energy procurement (solar panels).
task_instruction: Rank by: cost per watt 40%, warranty years 25%, efficiency rating 20%, installation timeline 15%.
ground_truth_decision: EcoWatts Ltd > SolarEdge Premium > GreenSun Corp > SunPower Direct

description: Rank bids for construction of a warehouse facility in a logistics park.
task_instruction: Rank contractors by: total bid price 45%, project timeline 25%, safety record 20%, local subcontracting 10%.
ground_truth_decision: FastBuild Corp > BuildRight Construction > PrimeBuild Ltd

description: Rank catering vendors responding to an RFQ for a corporate campus cafeteria.
task_instruction: Rank by: meal cost per person 35%, menu variety 30%, hygiene certification 25%, waste reduction programme 10%.

description: Rank three staffing agencies responding to an RFQ for temporary warehouse staff.
task_instruction: Rank by: hourly rate 40%, worker reliability score 35%, compliance record 25%.

description: Rank pharmaceutical cold-chain logistics providers for vaccine distribution.
task_instruction: Rank by: temperature compliance rate 50%, cost per shipment 25%, coverage area 15%, GDP certification 10%.

description: Rank insurance brokers responding to an RFQ for company-wide property and liability coverage.
task_instruction: Rank by: annual premium 40%, coverage breadth 35%, claims service rating 25%.
ground_truth_decision: ShieldCover Insurance > TrustGuard Brokers > ProtectAll Corp

description: Assess supply chain risk for a single-source automotive component supplier with declining financial performance.
task_instruction: Evaluate overall supply chain risk considering financial health, geopolitical exposure, operational performance, and alternative sourcing options.

description: Evaluate risk of a Chinese electronics component supplier amid trade tariff uncertainty.
task_instruction: Assess risk level accounting for geopolitical exposure, tariff risk, financial stability, and supply chain resilience.

description: Assess supplier risk for a US-based specialty chemical supplier with strong financials.
task_instruction: Evaluate overall risk profile based on financial health, delivery performance, quality record, and market position.

description: Evaluate risk from a logistics provider that has recently been acquired and is undergoing integration.
task_instruction: Assess transition risk, operational continuity risk, and financial risk from the merger/acquisition.

description: Assess environmental and regulatory compliance risk for a mining company supplier.
task_instruction: Evaluate supplier risk based on environmental compliance history, regulatory violations, and ESG performance.

description: Evaluate cybersecurity risk from a SaaS vendor with access to sensitive customer data.
task_instruction: Assess cyber and data security risk based on certifications, incident history, and access level to sensitive data.

description: Assess weather and climate-related supply disruption risk for an agricultural input supplier.
task_instruction: Evaluate risk of supply disruption due to climate exposure, geographic concentration, and historical disruption frequency.

description: Evaluate risk of a new start-up vendor providing AI-powered quality inspection services.
task_instruction: Assess operational and financial risk of onboarding an early-stage vendor with no proven track record at scale.

description: Evaluate whether to renew a 3-year facilities management contract based on performance data.
task_instruction: Recommend renewal or non-renewal based on SLA compliance history, cost competitiveness, and relationship quality.

description: Decide on renewal of a staffing agency contract with repeated compliance issues.
task_instruction: Recommend renewal or non-renewal. Consider compliance violations as a disqualifying factor if exceeding policy threshold (>2 in contract period).

description: Assess whether to renew a cloud services agreement with an incumbent vendor.
task_instruction: Evaluate renewal against benchmarks for cost, uptime, and new capability requirements. Recommend renewal only if all thresholds are met.

description: Review renewal of a waste disposal contract with significant price increase requested.
task_instruction: Recommend renewal or re-tender. If the price increase exceeds 8%, recommend competitive re-tender.

description: Evaluate renewal of a security guarding services contract with good performance history.
task_instruction: Recommend renewal if performance meets or exceeds KPIs and price increase is within approved band (max 5% annual).

description: Decide whether to renew a software development outsourcing contract or switch vendors.
task_instruction: Evaluate the vendor's delivery quality, team retention, and responsiveness. Recommend renewal if at least 80% of KPIs are met.

description: Select a freight forwarder for cross-border shipments from Asia to Europe.
task_instruction: Choose the freight forwarder with the best combination of transit time, cost, customs expertise, and tracking capability.
vendor_data: {"annual_shipments": 600, "route": "Asia_to_Europe", "avg_shipment_weight_kg": 2000, "vendors": [{"name": "GlobalFreight Alliance", "avg_transit_days": 28, "cost_per_kg_usd": 2.80, "customs_offices": 45, "real_time_tracking": true}, {"name": "OceanRoute Forwarders", "avg_transit_days": 35, "cost_per_kg_usd": 2.20, "customs_offices": 30, "real_time_tracking": true}, {"name": "AirSea Logistics", "avg_transit_days": 22, "cost_per_kg_usd": 3.40, "customs_offices": 52, "real_time_tracking": true}]}

description: Select a last-mile delivery partner for e-commerce fulfilment with high volume and tight SLA.
task_instruction: Choose the last-mile carrier offering the best on-time delivery rate, cost per parcel, and returns handling capability.

description: Choose a 3PL warehouse operator for a new regional distribution centre.
task_instruction: Select the 3PL with the best WMS capability, sufficient storage capacity, competitive cost, and proximity to target market.

description: Select a refrigerated transport company for a national dairy distribution network.
task_instruction: Choose the carrier with the best cold chain compliance, national coverage, and competitive rates for refrigerated transport.

description: Choose an air freight partner for urgent high-value electronics shipments.
task_instruction: Select the air freight partner with the fastest transit, best cargo security, and suitable insurance coverage.

description: Select a customs broker for managing import documentation across 15 countries.
task_instruction: Choose the customs broker with the widest country coverage, best compliance record, and fastest clearance times.

description: Approve or reject a sourcing request for rare earth minerals from a new overseas supplier.
task_instruction: Approve the sourcing request if the supplier meets compliance requirements (conflict minerals policy, environmental standards) and pricing is within budget.

description: Evaluate a sourcing request for recycled aluminium from a domestic supplier.
task_instruction: Approve if the material meets the required grade specification and the supplier holds current quality certifications.

description: Review a sourcing request for organic cotton from a supplier with unverified fair-trade claims.
task_instruction: Reject the sourcing request if the supplier cannot provide verified fair-trade and organic certifications.

description: Evaluate a sourcing request for semiconductor wafers from a qualified supplier.
task_instruction: Approve if the supplier is on the approved vendor list, the quote is within the agreed framework pricing, and delivery meets the production schedule.

description: Approve or reject a quality inspection report for a batch of incoming automotive components.
task_instruction: Approve the batch if defect rate is below the acceptance quality limit (AQL 0.65). Reject if above AQL or if critical defects are found.

description: Review a quality audit report for a food manufacturing facility.
task_instruction: Approve continued supplier status if no critical non-conformances are found. Flag for suspension if critical issues exist.

description: Review a certificate of analysis for a chemical raw material batch.
task_instruction: Approve if all CoA parameters are within specification limits. Reject if any parameter is out of specification.

description: Approve a supplier's annual quality management system self-assessment.
task_instruction: Approve if the self-assessment score meets the minimum threshold (75%) and all mandatory sections are completed.

description: Approve an emergency sole-source purchase for critical production line parts to avoid plant shutdown.
task_instruction: Approve emergency purchase if: plant shutdown is imminent (within 48h), no qualified alternative supplier can deliver in time, and spend is within emergency authority limit.

description: Evaluate an emergency procurement request for PPE supplies during a reported safety incident.
task_instruction: Approve if the emergency purchase is necessary for worker safety, within emergency budget limits, and from an approved supplier.

description: Review an emergency IT hardware purchase request where no emergency actually exists.
task_instruction: Approve only if there is a genuine operational emergency. Reject if the requirement is not time-critical or can follow normal procurement.

description: Approve an emergency catering order for an unexpected executive board meeting.
task_instruction: Approve emergency catering if within discretionary spend limit and from a pre-approved vendor list.

description: Evaluate a critical sub-supplier (Tier-2) identified during a supply chain mapping exercise.
task_instruction: Assess whether the Tier-2 sub-supplier meets minimum standards for quality, labour practices, and environmental compliance. Recommend approve, conditional approval, or reject.

description: Perform a multi-tier audit assessment on a Tier-3 sub-supplier with reported human rights concerns.
task_instruction: Recommend immediate suspension if critical human rights violations are confirmed. Recommend conditional approval if concerns are unverified but warrant investigation.
vendor_data: {"tier1_supplier": "GlobalTextiles Ltd", "tier2_supplier": "FabricMill Industries", "tier3_supplier": "CottonField Cooperative", "tier3_country": "Uzbekistan", "human_rights_concern_reported": true, "independent_audit_conducted": false, "ilo_conventions_violations_confirmed": false, "government_forced_labour_programme": true, "annual_indirect_spend_usd": 1200000}
